first_run.rationale: The score is identical (6/10), and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the exact same strengths (distributed systems experience, current AI work) and the same primary concerns (complete lack of Python, recency of high-throughput systems work, thin evidence of staff-level operational scope). The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and show no connection to the change in the university's location.
